Container.Name: ASA-Manager
Container.Overview: ARK Survival Ascended dedicated server with web management UI. Access UI at http://[IP]:8080. Requires 16GB+ RAM. On first run click Install in the web UI to download ~15 GB of server files, then click Start Server.
Container.Requires: 16GB RAM minimum. 25GB free disk space for server files.

Config.Name: Server Data
Config.Description: Stores server files, saves, config, and logs. Requires ~25 GB free.

Config.Name: Game Port (UDP)
Config.Description: ARK game traffic — forward this port on your router.

Config.Name: Raw UDP Port
Config.Description: ARK raw UDP port (GamePort+1) — forward this port on your router.

Config.Name: Instance Name
Config.Description: Unique name for this server instance. Useful when running multiple servers.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Examples: America/New_York, America/Los_Angeles, Europe/London, UTC

Config.Name: Map Name
Config.Description: ARK map to load. Options: TheIsland_WP, Aberration_WP, ScorchedEarth_WP, TheCenter_WP

Config.Name: Session Name
Config.Description: Server name displayed in the in-game server browser.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: RCON and in-game admin password. Change this before starting the server!

Config.Name: Server Password
Config.Description: Password players must enter to join. Leave blank for a public server.

Config.Name: Max Players
Config.Description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server simultaneously.

Config.Name: Mod IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated CurseForge mod IDs to install. Example: 927090,880477

Config.Name: Game Port (Env)
Config.Description: Game port the ARK server process binds to. Must match the Game Port mapping above.

Config.Name: RCON Port (Env)
Config.Description: RCON port the server process binds to. Must match the RCON Port mapping above.

Config.Name: RCON Enabled
Config.Description: Enable RCON remote console (TRUE/FALSE). Required for graceful shutdown and player listing.

Config.Name: BattlEye
Config.Description: Enable BattlEye anti-cheat (TRUE/FALSE). May cause issues on Linux with Proton.

Config.Name: Custom Server Args
Config.Description: Additional command-line arguments appended to the server launch command.
